chapter_title.en: Chapter on Whose Testimony Must Be Rejected and Whose Testimony Must Be Accepted

text: 3290 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "لاَ تُصَلَّى خَلْفَ مَنْ يَبْغِي عَلَى اَلْأَذَانِ وَ اَلصَّلاَةِ بِالنَّاسِ أَجْراً وَ لاَ تُقْبَلُ شَهَادَتُهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3290 - And Muhammad ibn Muslim narrated from Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
"Do not pray behind one who seeks payment for the call to prayer and leading people in prayer, and his testimony is not accepted."
